top_signals.title: Spotify soars 13% after announcing AI music deal with UMG, guidance
top_signals.summary: Spotify, which is holding its first investor day in four years, is now under the direction of co-CEOs Gustav Söderström and Alex Norström.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
